realDataPolicy: Commit event/source metadata and synthetic fixtures only. Put real public lead imports under data/real/ and review before publishing.
prioritySignals: local Toronto or GTA Bitcoin developers
Canadian Bitcoin protocol, cryptography, wallet, or node contributors
builders in direct-flight seed cities such as Edmonton, Calgary, Vancouver, Montreal, Ottawa, Winnipeg, New York, Chicago, Boston, Seattle, San Francisco, Austin, and London
people already discussing consensus, protocol review, node policy, ossification, Bitcoin Core, wallets, Lightning, privacy, or open-source Bitcoin tooling
public attendees or side-event seekers around Toronto crypto events on July 21-24, 2026
blockedSignals: unreviewed ticket discount, speaker, sponsor, visa, or travel claims
automated replies, follows, likes, or form submissions

lanes.name: Official BTC++ page
lanes.useFor: event facts, official language, ticket URL, topic framing

lanes.name: Nostr public notes
lanes.useFor: public notes with reachable nostr:note provenance

lanes.name: Reddit public web search
queries: site:reddit.com/r/Bitcoin Toronto bitcoin developer conference July 2026
site:reddit.com consensus bitcoin conference Canada July 2026
lanes.useFor: public posts only; no logged-in-only threads

lanes.name: X public search
lanes.useFor: public posts with source URLs; no automated engagement

lanes.name: Toronto Bitcoin communities
lanes.useFor: community context and public event discovery, not member scraping

lanes.name: Adjacent Toronto crypto events
lanes.useFor: near-date audience context; outreach must distinguish BTC++ as a technical Bitcoin/protocol event
